title: Data Management for Analytics Part 2
description: This course will offer you an opportunity to learn the fundamental concepts and emerging technologies in data storage and data governance. It presents a balanced theory-practice focus and covers Structured Query Language, and two flavors of NoSQL databases in MongoDB and Neo4j graph database. It also includes a brief introduction to big data management including hadoop, MapReduce, and Apache Spark. By the end of this part 2 course on data analytics, you will have a foundational understanding of the theory and applications of database management to support data analytics, data mining, machine learning, and artificial intelligence.
